ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "english_name" TEXT /* English short name of the country */,
  "alpha_2_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code */,
  "alpha_3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code */,
  "numeric_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code as per ISO 3166 standard */,
  "iso3166_2" TEXT /* ISO 3166-2 code representation */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone information */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population */,
  "gdp_usd" REAL /* GDP in USD */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the country record */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the current record became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the current record will no longer be effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region (for hierarchical regions) */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the region record */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the current record became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the current record will no longer be effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country-region mapping */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region to which the country belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected country */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., name change, annexation) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the change */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the change record */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the change became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the change will no longer be effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_changes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the export was made */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the data exported (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the export operation */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the exported file */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "export_duration" REAL /* Duration of the export process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the alias is defined */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Alternate name or alias for the country */,
  "alias_type" TEXT /* Type of alias (e.g., informal, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_aliases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country to which the metric belongs */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., population, GDP) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the metric is recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country related to the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the historical event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical event data */,
  "importance_level" INTEGER /* Importance level of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the event */,
  "references" TEXT /* Links or references to additional information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_events_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
